titles.title: I Wrote a Letter to my Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wrote a letter to my Lord I didn't know where ro start. There was so much to thank Him for that swelled within my heart. I thanked Him for the love inside that i didn't have befor. And at the end i signed it I'll be yours forevermore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I wanna be yours forever, yours forever Lord I wanna be yours, forever, Yours forever, yours forever, yours forever more.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A few days later in Sunday School We learned John 3: 16. IT told of everlasting life if only we'd believe. Now, everlasting means forever And i began to see. God's Word was a letter to my heart. He's written back to me.
